title: Phase 0 Section A: Project scaffold and monorepo setup
description: Set up npm workspaces monorepo with packages/engine (pure TS) and app (Vite React PWA). Configure Vitest for engine tests and fake-indexeddb for data-layer tests. Verify npm run dev and npm test both pass.
close_reason: All Section A tasks complete. Monorepo scaffold, engine package, Vite PWA app, Vitest, and fake-indexeddb all wired up. npm test passes green across both packages.

title: Phase 0 Section C: engine domain entities
description: Define all pure TypeScript entity types in packages/engine/src/entities/. Write failing test first, then implement each entity to pass. Entities: enums, Character, Block, WeekTemplate, WorkoutTemplate, Signals, WorkoutLog, DailyContext, StatusEffect.

title: Phase 0 Section B: PWA shell setup
description: Install and configure vite-plugin-pwa for the Bellbound app. Verify service worker registers and app shell loads offline. No unit tests — browser verification only per TDD protocol.
close_reason: PWA shell complete: icons created, vite-plugin-pwa configured, browser verification steps documented in implementation trail.
